Chatbot.title: Meet OceanGuide
Chatbot.description: Ask about OceanSkill, MCP setup, choosing skills, credits, and security. Answers are grounded in the public catalog and documentation.
Chatbot.welcome: Hi, I’m OceanGuide. Ask me how to connect MCP, choose a skill, or understand your usage.
Chatbot.disclaimer: OceanGuide answers from curated OceanSkill knowledge. It cannot access private skill content or your account data.
Chatbot.fallback: I do not have a reliable answer for that yet. Try asking about MCP setup, skill selection, credits, API keys, or Supabase security.
suggestions: How do I connect OceanSkill MCP?
Which skill should I start with?
How are credits and usage counted?

knowledge.answer: Open Docs, create a dedicated API key in your dashboard, add the OceanSkill MCP endpoint to your agent client, then verify that the client can list active skills.
Start with one skill whose outcome is easy to verify. Check its compatible clients, current version, license, and required permissions before connecting it.
The dashboard shows your current credit balance and MCP usage. Successful protected calls record usage; failed reserved calls are released instead of being charged as completed work.

Supabase Auth validates identity, while Row Level Security scopes API keys, credits, orders, and usage to their owner. Full skill instructions are delivered only through the authenticated MCP boundary.
